chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 106 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 05.06.2023 Mr. Imdad Hyder Solangi, Advocate along with petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State SIP Muhammad Ishaque Mallah, Additional SHO P.S Naushahro Feroze, SIP Hakimuddin Sahito, SHO Police Station, Moro. >>>>>>>>..<<<<<<< Comments have been filed by SSP, Naushahro Feroze, SHOs Police Stations, Moro, Halani, Incharge CIA Center, Naushahro Feroze and SDPO, Naushahro Feroze, which are taken on record. Police will not harass and act in accordance with the Law. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied on the representation given by learned Additional PG. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge ARBROHI
